subHeadline: The engines Land Rover and Range Rover owners search for most, ranked by real 2025 enquiry volume — with our honest verdict on each.

verdict.label: Watch
verdict.text: pre-2019 timing chain tensioner risk; significantly improved from 2019 onward. The #1 most-enquired JLR engine.

verdict.label: Avoid
verdict.text: catastrophic crankshaft bearing failure; largely unrepairable once it starts. £6,500–£9,500 recon.

verdict.label: Avoid
verdict.text: oil pump housing failure often kills the engine outright before any other symptom appears.

verdict.label: Monitor
verdict.text: timing chain tensioner failure on early L322 units; well-maintained examples are largely trouble-free.

verdict.label: Best
verdict.text: the most durable engine in the range. Highest replacement cost but lowest failure rate.

verdict.label: Safe
verdict.text: more reliable than the diesel Ingenium; water pump is the primary weak point.

legend.title: What do these verdicts mean?
legend.text: Our verdicts combine failure frequency, repair complexity, and total cost of ownership to help you make the right decision.
